hotel_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Novotel Phú Quốc (Novotel Phu Quoc Resort)

reviews.title: The worst customer service
reviews.text: Booked shuttle bus to airport, but because staff was too lazy to remind us or even came on time when requested to pick the family up, we ended up missing our flight. Poor management for a resort managed by novotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Le,

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Novotel Phu Quoc Resort. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.

At Novotel, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer; therefore your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence.

We appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Sincerely,

Hanh Truong
Quality Control
Novotel Phu Quoc Resort

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Swimming Pool and Breakfast
reviews.negatives:
1. The free shuttle service was not enough. We have flight at 5pm and so they have free shuttle service at 1 pm and 3 pm so I need to used the shuttle of 1pm resulting to stay at airport for 4 hours.

2. Similar shuttle to pick has to be increased since we need to wait for 1 hour while we arrive at 12.30 and they have shuttle at 2 pm.

3. Driver and the travel desk staff was rude and not supporting to load and unload material 
Keeping material purposely  and chances of broking the suitcase was observed 
Even smiling like they hate the Indians and talking in their language ( I have personally told the same to receptionist)

4. Beachside is dirty even though it was private beach and not able to swim or even chance to get into.

5. Overall not worthy to spend money at this hotel and you have very good option nearby with less amount

reviews.title: Terrible experience
reviews.text:
My wife and I travelled to the Novotel with our 2 young children aged 1 and 4.  The reviews we read regarding this hotel being great for children lead us to making the 5 day booking.
The hotel itself is aesthetically nice as are the rooms.  Unfortunately that's where any positives end.
•The restaurants were dirty and unhygienic with food being on the floor from the previous night
•also dirty old food being left of the baby high chairs provided.  
•There was broken glass on the beach near to where you would clean your feet when returning back to the pool area.  
•The only restaurants with a children's menu does not open until 18:30 which is too late when you have a 13 month old child.
•The restaurants which were open had run out of food by 10:30am in the morning !
•The food which was served was only warm and never hot which could lead to several serious health issues.

Overall, our experience was very, very bad and we checked out after 3 nights of a 5 night stay to move to another hotel
reviews.response:
Dear Richie,

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Novotel Phu Quoc Resort. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.

At Novotel, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer; therefore your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence.

We appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Sincerely,

Hanh Truong
Quality Control
Novotel Phu Quoc Resort

reviews.title: Terrible Terrible Terrible

We sincerely apologize for falling short of meeting your expectations. As a teachable moment, we have shared your feedback with the appropriate resort teams to ensure the necessary guidelines are in place to prevent this from occurring in the future.

Sincerely,
Tram Nguyen (Ms.)
Guest Experience Manager
Novotel Phu Quoc Resort

reviews.title: Far location with no housekeeping
reviews.text: The location of the hotel is very far from Sunset Town where the whole city is alive. Additionally the housekeeping staff of the hotel is not working properly & my room was left without cleaning on both occasions & i had to request them to clean it after i arrived. The dirty glasses / cups were not replaced, fresh towels were not provided in the rooms. The lobby area outside the rooms is kept in an untidy manner deapite me telling the staff to clean the same. Overall not a pleasant stay experience.

reviews.text: 한국인이 가면 너무 좋아할 조건임 수영장도 좋고 소나시 지역에선 아동2 데리고 가기 여기만한 곳이 없음 특히 야시장 바로 앞이라 너무 편함 빌라동 방음은 안됨 고생할수있음 그거 말고는 추천

reviews.title: Did not meet with expectation in terms of quality of service and payment
reviews.positives: Location, beach and resort type - Villa
reviews.negatives:
Price was way too high than a market, 
Especially the price of all-inclusive was extremely high by comparing with a similar type of villa resorts in Thailand and Bali. Meal options in buffet dinner was limited and quite repetitive. And most disappointing thing was staffs & waiters did not have a basic english, so communication skill was bad. 

Melia must have fairly stated the meal price in booking.com because the unit price of buffet meal was shockingly higher when we just knew that in check-in process. 

As Waiters were really fast of removing a dirty dishes like hungry eagles, it was stressful to have a calm & comfort dinner.

Drill sound most of time in day, water leakage from façade in several area. Dirty in most of the passage area. Water blockage in bathroom.

If it’s 3star it’s expected but if Novatel says it’s Five star then they are cheating. Location is in between ghost town, rainy season not right time to visit there.

reviews.title: Not five star!
reviews.positives:
Nice beach, great (but very expensive) Christmas Eve buffet, good range of food for breakfast.

Thao at the pool bar was an awesome guy, worked so hard every day.
reviews.negatives:
This is not a five star standard hotel. The building is looking shabby. There is no pool side food and beverage service, unless you get up every time and walk to the bar / cafe to order, and then it can take 2-3 hours for anyone to wander by and clear your glasses and plates. 

Sun lounges and tables are in disrepair, towels - esp at the bottom pool - are stained and frayed. A couple of times when our room was cleaned, towels and robes that we left on the bathroom floor were collected and not replaced.

Smoking is allowed everywhere outside, including at food and beverage venues, at the pool, at the pool bar. This means families and children are surrounded by cigarette and vape smoke even if they don't want to be - this could be simply fixed with dedicated smoking areas outside, so that people who don't want to be choking on smoke can also relax outside. 

Overall we weren't impressed at all given the price and five star rating. 

Many better hotels, I'm sure.

reviews.text: Floors ceiling are either cracking or with water and mould. Room sofa are sinking. Sofa at the lobby look so over used and dirty.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Pool bar
reviews.negatives: Service wifi so bad

reviews.title: Nice hotel.. terrible spa - do not book !
reviews.text: my girlfriend and I stayed for 5 nights and on our first night we couldn't sleep because the curtain wouldn't fully close in our suite. we contacted reception and they said that it had been fixed, which it wasn't.. so we had to ask again... also the spa was so bad it wasn't even funny, the staff were not welcoming and the grade of the massage was horrible. we didn't feel welcome and felt more like cows about to be slaughtered.. a massage for a quarter of the price on the street would've been 10x better !

reviews.title: Strong 4 stars,  but very weak 5
reviews.positives: Beach was pretty good. Breakfast is okay too. Okay location, close to airport. Friendly staff, but sometimes had to tell them multiple times on the phone before gotten any results.
reviews.negatives:
Horrible wifi, although I stayed on the first floor. Hope they fix that issue, but I suggest asking if they did before you move in, if you need wifi for work. 
Prices of some things are overpriced,  like beer for example. 
I've stayed in MovenPick for a week too, and although its more premium (and about the same price when I booked)  prices in restaurants were cheaper.

reviews.title: Worst costumer service ever
reviews.text: Highly not recommended
reviews.response:
Dear Evan,
Thank you for your feedback and firstly on behalf of Novotel Phu Quoc Resort I would like to send my sincerest apology as I know this matter has given you a disappointment and inconvenient experience during your holiday.
A system error lead to overbooking of the room type you booked earlier.Our team reacted swiftly to fix the issue with Agoda, and tried to find the best suitable rooms for you in the shortest time.We also requested Agoda to contact you and inform you as soon as possible.Again, I'm truly sorry that we have not been able to arrange the exact room type that you wished to stay in.We will try our best to make sure this will not happen again and take appropriate measures to address the problem with all external websites and prevent future occurrence.
Please reach out to me directly at the Resort's email/phone if you have any addition information or you would be willing to give us a chance to turn your experience around.
Best regards,
Ngoc Hai
Quality Control

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
It is a great big hotel with everything included:
 - two big pools
 - a proprietary beach with free water equipment
 - a gym with a sauna
 - free tennis courts
 - wide hotel area with beautiful trees, hammocks, fish pools, etc.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast only lasts till 10:30 - if you're a late bird, you sure will skip it. Also, the price - though the hotel is 5 stars - it's still too expensive for a small room.

reviews.title: Very bad service
reviews.text: I booked hotel villa and paid for everything but after couple of hours, I received phone call from agoda telling me that the villa is sold out and ask me to book another hotel or choose another room

reviews.title: Nice hotel but not a 5*
reviews.positives: Hotel is located on the beach and Sonasea night market. Large rooms and bathrooms. Good size balcony overlooking the sea.The grounds are very well kept. Nice big pool overlooking the beach.
reviews.negatives:
The rooms are a bit outdated. The bathroom at the bar is very old, unclean and not the standard of a “5* hotel”. 
The beautiful swimming pools had barely any sunbeds, obviously not enough to the number of the guests at the hotel. And the same at the beach.

reviews.title: Under construction site
reviews.text: We had tried several soft openning something hotelbut this is the most dissappointed experience. A remote location, power not stable and noisy power generator, dust cover all the hotel and balconies, construction debris not cleaned yet and gave us some scratch, no nearby restaurant and the hotel offer a buffet dinner only. The only beautiful things are beach and the nearby infinitive pool.

reviews.title: We had a really nice stay at the Novotel. A lovely room and resort in a beautiful setting. Not quite five star but solid
reviews.positives: The resort was excellent value for money and the whole family had a fun stay. We had a spacious room which was ideal for our family. The shower was good, balcony great and bed comfortable. The pools were clean and good sizes, breakfast was nice and the proximity to beach was ideal. There is also a small strip of shops and restaurants across the street which was very useful. The tennis courts, gym and bike hire was popular and kids play room a good spot to hide from the hottest sun of the day. My daughter (5) loved the foam party, cookery class and painting. Staff were all very friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives:
The resort isn’t quite five star in terms of the service provided. The staff were lovely but seemed a little short handed so the attention to detail wasn’t there. Room cleaning was sporadic and didn’t happen until after 1630 one day and it wasn’t done to a very high level.

The beach needs a clean as there was trash in sand. Cigarette butts were the biggest culprits and we were unhappy on the relaxed attitude to smoking in general. Guests were smoking at the beach, around the pool and at least one instance at breakfast and this went unchallenged. 

The supervision at the kids club wasn’t always at a high level. There was one occasion when I couldn’t see any staff and wouldn’t feel confident leaving my youngest there (2). I also had to ask that some older children stopped playing on the PlayStation there as they were playing Call of Duty, a game not suitable for under-18s. The staff were nonchalant about this.

The WiFi is atrocious!

reviews.title: NEEDS RENOVATION
reviews.text:
WE STAYED 3N IN THIS PROPERTY. BUT WOULD NOT RECOMMEND. THERE IS LEAKAGE OF WATER THOUGH OUT THE PROPERTY. BATHROOM THE CURTAINS ARE TORN! 
OVERALL NOT A VERY GOOD EXPEREINCE.

reviews.title: Good breakfast and beach. Pool and room was dirty.
reviews.positives: The ocean and good breakfast
reviews.negatives: The room was not clean enough for 5 stars resort. My wife stepped on a cockroach

reviews.title: Terrible...
reviews.text:
We booked Phú Quốc Novotel Nov 28 2019 Room # 505, water dripping from ceiling inside closets, water run on  the floor , got changed to room #444 but room key not working, changed room again to  #326, manager sent cookies for apology. At mid-night I worked  with my PC in front of room table then found out the chair was broken,  the chair was leaning to the left and I got  back pain after 2 hours work.
Please also check my booking Novotel Taipei Taoyuan International Airport 6 Mar 2018, where the room ceiling also had water stain and lizard chasing mosquito.
reviews.response:
Dear Chun,

Xin Chào!

We sincerely apologize for falling short of meeting your expectations.

The first room assign it was unexpected problem occurs last minute, for the last room move is to fully enjoy your room with a nice view and more on the natural lights and i am very sorry about the chair as our team lacks on checking properly, we could had change it immediately that time for more of your comfort while working.

While I wish you had a better experience, it is feedback like this that we learn from and as a teachable moment, we have shared your feedback with the appropriate Resort teams to ensure the necessary guidelines are in place to prevent this from occurring in the future and all our efforts are concentrated in preventing future occurrences.

Again please accept our sincerest apology and It is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Sincerely,
Ms. Jubanny Ariola
Guest Experience Manager
Novotel Phu Quoc Resort

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff was nice, the food was great (breakfast and seafood restaurant). The massage was amazing .
reviews.negatives:
The noise from the customers., the staff allows the guests to bring their own speakers at the pool and at the fine dining restaurant... It's really annoying for the other guests.

The music at the pool close to the beach was too load and techno music is not what we expected in a 5* hotel... 

The room, the view "on the pool" was actually a view on the roof...

reviews.title: Bad housekeeping
reviews.text: Houskeeping is bad.  When i back to room at afternoon,i found the bed sheet is still wet. And missed on towel in shower room. Shower gel/shampoo is put in the trash can. But taff is friendly and heldful......
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
- The beach was very nice and clean, it was absolutely worth coming here just for this!

- We also liked their garden. It was beautifully maintained, it overall creates cozy and private vibe.

- The resort was generally very quiet, unlike some other resorts in the island. It was quite good fit for us as we are not really into parties.

- There are a few local restaurants and convenience stores nearby, so we didn't need to have all meals at the resort (they are much cheaper than the hotel, but quite expensive in the Vietnamese standard)

- Tennis court and ping-pong table are free to use!
reviews.negatives:
- Not all staff at this hotel speak good English. We found it a bit difficult to order things in bars and restaurants. The therapist I had at the Spa didn't speak English either. It can become quite tricky if you have special requests.

- Breakfast could be better, especially pastries were a bit disappointing.

- The hotel didn't accept NFC payment's

reviews.title: Service is not good - staff does not speak english
reviews.text:
The facilities are great, but the service provided is not of a 5* hotel. Most of the employees do not speak English fluently and we were misinformed multiple times.
Our experience renting bikes in the hotel was awful, the employee in charge of it scammed us making us fill more fuel than needed - we returned the bikes with a full tank when we were supposed to return it almost empty (as they gave it to us). One of the bikes had the speedometer broken (stuck in 0km/h) and the employee was not gonna give us a receipt hadn't we insist on it. 
The beach around the hotel is extremely filthy, rubbish is a problem in Phu Quoc in general.
reviews.response:
Dear Martina, 

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Novotel Phu Quoc Resort. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.

At Novotel, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer; therefore your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence.

We appreciate your sharing your concerns Thank you for staying with us and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Sincerely,

Hanh Truong
Quality Control
Novotel Phu Quoc Resort

reviews.title: Great hotel in Phu Quoc!
reviews.positives:
I stayed 5 nights and 6 days at Novotel Resort Phu Quoc. It was overall a very nice stay! But to provide a comprehensive idea of this resort to other potential customers:

Pros: 
-The suite room has a really good sea view with a big balcony to rest. Plus, the bedroom and the living room are spacious.—The closet was definitely a plus for us, as we were staying 6 days.
-Reactivity. The staff at the reception desk was very responsive on some matters, such as fixing the glass door of the WC (cf.below), bringing a coffee maker and a desk light.
-the resort is really clean and comfortable.
-Ms Hang at the reception desk and Mr Tiêń at the fitness Center were really friendly and willing to help!
-the fitness Center was good. They provide towels, water etc.
-the housekeeping team is really smiling and efficient.
reviews.negatives:
Cons:
-the wall plugs are a little bit dangerous.
-the WC glass door of the master bedroom bathroom wasn’t stable and trembling each time we opened and closed it. (We told the reception about this issue in the morning and they came fix it about 10 mins after.)
-the suite was very dark even with lights switched on.
-when booking the suite I thought there’ll be a coffee maker (with free capsule coffee) as indicated in the suite room description (cf. Screenshot where you can see a red coffee machine on the desk of the suite + room description). But they bring the coffee machine upon request and told me that the coffee maker wasn’t included in the suite room so 1 capsule coffee will be charged 40 000 vnd … I recommend Novotel to indicate that clearly or to just remove the photo with the coffee maker in the room and edit the description for this room.
-we took some baths and the water wasn’t clear even after a few baths.
-no ventilation in the toilets so they were often damp.

reviews.title: All about the hotel
reviews.text:
1. Location: hotel is located far away from sightseeing and the central. Choosing this hotel if the purpose of the trip is not for travel or sightseeing but taking rest.

2. Facilities & commodities: my first step when checking in my room is ok. Every facilities are clean, bright, and warm. However, wifi didn't connected in the room. Receptionist had to call technology guy to set up a seperate wifi device in room for us to us. In the afternoon, the TV in room got problem that my dad could watch any channel, light at door was off tottally. I had to call receptionist again for support. However, the technology guy couldn't fix them & requested for us to change room. All the troubles started here. To me, it is not professional and not presevered as a 4 star hotel.

3. Services attitude: Quite slow
- Receptionists are nice & welcomed. Check in services are fast. Deposit request is quite weird and complicated to me but it wasn't a big deal. 
- I also saw that receptionist also figured out that welcome drink is slow. 
- Solving problems: my unpleasure about this hotel is solving problems. When the technology guy was unable to fix TV and door light, he called receptionist to report and request to change room. The receptionist called me to tell us change room in 15mins. After we packed our stuffs, the manager of hotel asked us not to move due to some reasons abc....i was so unhapply about this and he said it is just another offer and if i dont agree, he still arrange to switch room. He said we could go out for dinner, their staffs would help to move our luggage to another room and inform me a new room when we finish our dinner. However, after i came to the receptionist to ask about room number and breakfast info., she said they couldn't take our luggage to new room since guest wasn't in room. What a "nice" excuse. After that, the bell guy come to our room to get stuff but receptionist told us a wrong room number and we had to go around the hotel many times at 10pm. Th

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.positives: It was very comfortable to spend time for my vacation.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Minor management needed to improve.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.positives: Had an enjoyable stay at the Novotel. Comfortable stay & good service though English speaking staff are a few only. The beach fronting the resort was littered with rubbish which was sad. Weather was not the best- very windy & rainy  but we made the most of it.

reviews.title: Not worth for indians vegetarians
reviews.text: They have so much of Indian tourists and they do not have indian food or vegetarian options . Sheraton phu quoc is soo good for taking care of vegans

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives: Very nice property and the grounds were well maintained.  The two swimming pools were very nice also.  We enjoyed our spacious one bedroom unit with 1 1/2 baths and a double wide balcony. Lots of people stayed at the resort, yet it didn't feel crowded, except at breakfast time.  Very convenient location to go to the night market across the street from the hotel.
reviews.negatives: No electrical outlets in the bathroom.  Hotel is a little dated and so was our room.  Could use a refresh.  Breakfast food variety was good, but the quality was alright, nothing to rave about.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
1. Không đúng view vườn - view mái tôn nhà để xe máy
2. Móc treo trog nhà VS quá cao, không hợp lý
3. Rèm trong nhà tắm cũ, sờn rách
4. Không có khăn vuông lau mặt
5. Không có lược chải

reviews.title: overall the stay was very good and worth the money spend
reviews.positives: the view from room towards ocean was very nice, beautiful and big swimming pools, big compound and can cycle just beside beach, nice beach also. there is a good night market just nearby hotel.
reviews.negatives: the hotel buildings are a big old, with inconsistent water pressure from tap and shower, initial water was yellowish in colour

reviews.title: Wonderful hotel at a very good location
reviews.positives:
Breakfast, Pool bar, Beach were excellent.
Swimming in the sea is not very recommended as the slope was a bit rough.
Rooms, staff and the rest are all good.

reviews.title: Far from city, limited shuttle service
reviews.text:
When we arrived Novotel,  no one bothered us even though we stood at lobby for few minutes. No one welcome us as well as direct us to check in counter.
The breakfast is below my expectation, the bread is not fresh. Limited seat for the shuttle bus to airport and city. However, good environment with a two pools that you can enjoy the sea view
reviews.response:

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. While I wish you had a better experience, it is feedback like this that we learn from and use to improve. 
Our Heartists work hard to deliver an exceptional guest experience, and it's apparent in this case that we fell short. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence.

We appreciate you sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Terima Kasih!

Sincerely,
Ms. Jubanny Ariola
Guest Experience Manager
Novotel Phu Quoc Resort

reviews.title: It allost meets all my expectations.
reviews.positives:
Great many thanks to the staff at the check-in counter who helped us in making reservations of local restaurants and voyages. The shuttle service between bungalows and the hobby is of convenience. 

Furthermore, the location of the resort is thrilling for sunset viewing, with about 15 minutes drive from the Phu Quoc airport.
reviews.negatives:
There is no anti-mosquito spray inside the room. 

The canoe/kayak on the beach cannot be used, which is okay but need to keep us informed.

reviews.title: Not enough shuttle service
reviews.text: More frequent or a bigger bus

reviews.title: Good hotel for quiet and relaxing vacation
reviews.positives: Very good breakfast, a lot of selection. Great pools, enough place for everyone, no feeling that there are a lot of people as the pools are located 1 at the beach site, another one close to the hotel building. Beach is 2 minutes walking, clean, warm water (December).
reviews.negatives: The rooms are not designed for the families: if you want to ask for an extra bed there is simply no place to put it. If to put it, there is no place left in the room

reviews.title: Terrible experiences with both the staff and the hotel policies
reviews.text: We felt very frustratingly neglected before our check-in (we called them to confirm our booking the day before our checkin) and during our stay.  Many of the staff were very rude and unprofessional in every aspects of customer service. I will never come back to Novotel Phú Quoc Resort again and I will never ever recommend this resort to any of my friends. The most terrible experience with customer service industry.

reviews.title: A pleasant stay, unbeatable location by the beach
reviews.positives: The hotel facilities are great, with a stunning location right by the beach. Staff are kind, always eager to welcome you with a warm smile. The food was tasty with a breakfast buffet similar to what you would expect from other resorts like this.
reviews.negatives: Our first two nights were spent in a room with some appearant draining issues. We woke up and discovered sand and a sewar smell in the shower, in essence making the room unlivable. Upon explaining this to the staff we were first offered an upgrade to a new room later in the day. Once we explained that the smell our current room was unbearable we were swiftly moved to a new upgraded room.

reviews.title: Leaking ceiling, sticky flooring
reviews.text: Good Restaurant, Good Kids play area, Good location, Great pool and view but leaking ceiling in the rooms and sticky flooring

reviews.title: Lovely place to stay but avoid peak times if you value peace and quiet
reviews.positives: Comfortable rooms. Great breakfast. Good value.
reviews.negatives: Pool was a bit murky but this was probably due to the sheer volume of people staying at the time. Hard to find a spot on the beach or at the pool unless you got your towel on your sunbed before breakfast. Not the hotel's fault but you don't come to Vietnam for that.

reviews.title: Great Location
reviews.text: The hotel has one of the best locations for people arriving late to Phu Quoc as it is close to the airport. It has a clean facility as well as close to the night market with great food.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great hotel with amazing staff and food! Thank you for upgrading us to bungaloo from standard double room for our honeymoon! Breakfast was great, and buffet dinner was amazing. In addition, there are lots of activities to do at resort. I would recommend it for everyone!
reviews.negatives: Sometimes housekeeping wouldn't clean our room right away, only in the evening. We also had adjacent room, and soundproof was bad, the kid there was crazy and kept screaming. We talked to o=parents and they managed to calm him down.

reviews.title: Family Room
reviews.text: Facing the front lobby, very noisy at night when tourist comes back from their trip or when newly arrived. Was still renovating at the front so was very dusty. Found a chunk of hair in the room. Location wise is okie opposite have a night market which is convenient to grab things. Breakfast was limited mainly focused more towards Korean food.

reviews.negatives: The wifi was inconsistent which borderlined on frustrating

reviews.title: Nice beach and green envirement
reviews.positives: Nice room and convenient location

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Pros: If you’re looking for somewhere to relax and get away from the hustle and bustles of Phu Quoc then this is the perfect place. Beautiful views, great pools and right by the beach. However be prepared.

Cons: The location is terrible with limited food options. To get into the city centre it’s about VND170-180k one way, so a return trip is almost VND400k. Imagine doing this for Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner.. Buffet at the hotel starts at about VND450k for breakfast if you haven’t got this added to your booking. Lunch is about VND500k and Dinner VND650k - per person. Overall although I enjoyed my stay, I wouldn’t recommend nor return to Novotel. Plenty of better & cheaper options in the city centre.
reviews.response:
Dear Amie,

Xin Chào!

It is always a pleasure to receive positive feedback. I will share your comments with our team. I am sure that this feedback will serve as an encouragement to all of our Heartist as we strive to continuously improve the quality of our services.

Aside from our Buffet, we also have other Food and Beverage outlets that serves Ala Carte and snack menu to cater for each guest preferences.

Thank you again for sharing your experience, and we hope your next visit will be as pleasant as the previous one.

Sincerely,
Ms. Jubanny Ariola
Guest Experience Manager
Novotel Phu Quoc Resort

reviews.title: Definitely recommended for family with Kids
reviews.positives:
Best part of this hotel is clean and awesome Beach with free Kayaking.
Second best is the Pools - two large well maintained pools.
Third best is the endless breakfast - still i rate third is due to the repetitions most days.
reviews.negatives:
Space - inside the rooms are pretty tight.
At first the front office given me a ground floor room with nothing to see :(
later after request they moved us to 4th floor - still ok.

reviews.title: Great property but rude & unaccommodating  staff
reviews.text:
I stayed at the hotel from April 1-3 with my family. The location is great with a beach and night market across the road. Although the package we bought from Agoda had early check in at 12 pm,  the hotel staff was very rude and didn’t give us the room till 1.30 pm. We had a night flight, my small kids 3 & 6 years old and my 75 year old father were dead tired. We made lots of requests to let us early check buy they were unfazed. The food quality is also very poor especially the Indian food. We also stayed at Sheraton for 3 nights, they gave us early check in for a villa (even though not part of package).  
The room service is also very slow. We had to call atleast 5 times for things we needed. The room didn’t have basic things like iron

reviews.room_type: Superior room, pool view - 2 twin bed

reviews.title: Great customer service, great facility, great location. Need more choices close by for food.
reviews.positives: The amenities were great. We liked the Origin water bottles - good tasting, glass recyclable bottles. It was clean except for the curtain in the shower area.
reviews.negatives: The restaurant food was terrible. The buffet was good but the dinner at the restaurant was below par. We had chicken curry - I can make better curry than that. If you want to charge those prices (USA prices) - your food needs to reflect that. Food was definitely overprice and not good.

reviews.title: Excellent property, average experience
reviews.text:
The property is absolutely beautiful. It has a semi private beach attached to it which is the highlight. Pickleball courts, tennis courts and a good kids club with full day planned activities make it an excellent destination for relaxing all day at the resort.

While the reception staff speak reasonably good english, others struggle. We had a poor experience on our first day when the hot water system malfunctioned and plumbing staff working in our bathroom almost throughout the day. After almoat half a day, the issue was fixed but not after 2-3 visits to the reception. Expected better for the price I was paying for my room.

Breakfast was decent with good options for vegetarians. Few indian dishes which were constant on all the days we were there as well. About 20 minutes away from sunset town but no shuttle service from the property which was quite surprising. 

Overall, if you're looking for a nice beach resort this is a good choice but do explore other properties as well nearby.

reviews.title: A relaxing beachfront stay with great breakfast, beautiful pools, and a lovely spa experience.
reviews.positives: We had a great stay at Novotel Phu Quoc Resort. The breakfast was excellent with a wide variety of options, fresh fruits, and both local and international dishes. The pool area is beautiful and well-maintained, perfect for relaxing during the day. The beach is clean, with soft sand and calm water — ideal for swimming. We also really enjoyed the spa, very professional service and a great way to unwind. Overall, the resort has a very comfortable and relaxing.
reviews.negatives: Everything was generally very good.

reviews.title: Ok ok
reviews.text: Not good breakfast, daily repeating same stuff, not much activities, vegetarian options very less,
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Novotel Phu Quoc Resort. 

I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies. 
At Novotel, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer; therefore your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence. 
We appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future. 

Sincerely, 

Novotel Phu Quoc Resort Management Team.

reviews.title: Great.  Highly recommend and will return
reviews.positives: Location to beach, the amenities. The buffet.
reviews.negatives: Lack of basic conversational English with staff

reviews.title: Great family stay!
reviews.positives: Just about 15 minutes from the airport, they do have a free shuttle. Just a few minutes to walk to the beach. Nice swimming pools.  Buffet was decent. Room service was awesome.
reviews.negatives: The computers in the library are pretty outdated considering that this is a 5 star facility. They should've had very fast computers and the TV in our room didn't have enough channels so it was boring to watch TV.
